# `pheno-worklog-schema`

> Parse, validate, and emit `WORKLOG.md` files in the v2.1 schema (11 columns, ADR-025).

## Docs

- [README](README.md): what / when / when not
- [SPEC](SPEC.md): schema + API surface + quickstart
- [AGENTS](AGENTS.md): substrate scope + cross-references
- [v2.1 schema table](AGENTS.md#schema--v21-canonical): 11 columns including `device:`

## Reference

- [ADR-025 (v2.1 bump)](https://example.com/phenotype-apps/docs/adr/2026-06-17/ADR-025-adr-015-v2-1.md): the 11th `device:` column
- [ADR-030 (extended v2.1)](https://example.com/phenotype-apps/docs/adr/2026-06-17/ADR-030-pheno-worklog-schema-v2-1.md): full spec
- [ADR-032 (decision)](https://example.com/phenotype-apps/docs/adr/2026-06-17/ADR-032-pheno-worklog-schema-decision.md): primitive lib, not duplicate of AgilePlus

## Releases

- [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md): Keep a Changelog format
- [WORKLOG](WORKLOG.md): dogfooded v2.1 schema

## Source

- [Repo](https://github.com/KooshaPari/phenotype-apps/tree/main/pheno-worklog-schema): governance + meta-bundle path in the monorepo
- [src/](src/pheno_worklog_schema/): executable Python source

## Examples

- [quickstart](examples/quickstart.py): 5-line demo
